requirement_topic.en: Motor Efficiency Classes (IE Code) — NM IEC 60034-30-1
requirement_topic.zh: 电动机效率等级（IE代码）——NM IEC 60034-30-1
requirement_topic.zht: 電動機效率等級（IE代碼）——NM IEC 60034-30-1

summary.en: Morocco adopts IEC standards as national NM standards through IMANOR (Institut Marocain de Normalisation). NM IEC 60034-30-1 (mirroring IEC 60034-30-1:2014) defines IE efficiency classes IE1 through IE4 for line-operated AC motors. ANRE (Autorité Nationale de Régulation de l'Electricité) and the national energy efficiency program PNEE (Programme National pour l'Efficacité Energétique) direct the market toward higher efficiency classes aligned with IEC 60034-30-1. Morocco does not currently impose an EU-equivalent mandatory MEPS regulation by law for imported industrial motors, but the IMANOR conformity route or CE DoC acceptance applies depending on the product category. CCC certification issued by Chinese authorities is not recognised in Morocco.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥通过IMANOR（摩洛哥标准化研究院）将IEC标准采纳为NM国家标准。NM IEC 60034-30-1（对应IEC 60034-30-1:2014）为线路运行交流电动机定义IE1至IE4效率等级。ANRE（国家电力监管局）及国家能效计划PNEE推动市场向IEC 60034-30-1所定义的更高效率等级发展。摩洛哥目前对进口工业电机未通过立法强制实施等同欧盟的最低能效标准（MEPS），但根据产品类别适用IMANOR合规路径或接受CE符合性声明。中国CCC认证不被摩洛哥认可。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥通過IMANOR（摩洛哥標準化研究院）將IEC標準採納為NM國家標準。NM IEC 60034-30-1（對應IEC 60034-30-1:2014）為線路運行交流電動機定義IE1至IE4效率等級。ANRE（國家電力監管局）及國家能效計劃PNEE推動市場向IEC 60034-30-1所定義的更高效率等級發展。摩洛哥目前對進口工業電機未通過立法強制實施等同歐盟的最低能效標準（MEPS），但根據產品類別適用IMANOR合規路徑或接受CE符合性聲明。中國CCC認證不被摩洛哥認可。

standards_or_laws: NM IEC 60034-30-1 (IMANOR adoption of IEC 60034-30-1:2014 — IE efficiency classes)
NM IEC 60034-1 (IMANOR adoption of IEC 60034-1 — ratings and performance)

summary.en: China uses GB 18613-2020 (Energy Efficiency Limits and Energy Efficiency Grades of Motors) which defines grades IE1 through IE4, aligned in naming with IEC 60034-30-1:2014 but with distinct numeric limit values. GB 18613-2020 mandates IE3 as minimum for most three-phase induction motors from 2021-06-01. CCC certification covers some low-voltage motors but is not recognised in Morocco; Chinese exporters must demonstrate conformity via IMANOR or CE DoC routes.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 18613-2020《电动机能效限定值及能效等级》，定义IE1至IE4能效等级（命名参考IEC 60034-30-1:2014，但具体限值有所不同）。GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起要求大多数三相感应电动机最低达到IE3。CCC认证覆盖部分低压电动机，但不被摩洛哥认可；中国出口商须通过IMANOR或CE符合性声明路径证明合规。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 18613-2020《電動機能效限定值及能效等級》，定義IE1至IE4能效等級（命名參考IEC 60034-30-1:2014，但具體限值有所不同）。GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起要求大多數三相感應電動機最低達到IE3。CCC認證覆蓋部分低壓電動機，但不被摩洛哥認可；中國出口商須通過IMANOR或CE符合性聲明路徑證明合規。

gap.en: Morocco's NM IEC 60034-30-1 uses the same IE class structure as IEC 60034-30-1, and GB 18613-2020 IE3 motors are broadly aligned in naming; however, the underlying numeric limits in GB 18613 may differ from IEC 60034-30-1:2014 at specific power/pole combinations. CCC certification is not recognised in Morocco — the exporter must use the IMANOR conformity route or present a CE DoC (accepted due to Morocco-EU Advanced Status). No direct equivalence between CCC and IMANOR/CE exists.
gap.zh: 摩洛哥NM IEC 60034-30-1采用与IEC 60034-30-1相同的IE等级结构，GB 18613-2020 IE3电机在命名上大体一致；但GB 18613的具体数值限制与IEC 60034-30-1:2014在特定功率/极数组合下可能存在差异。CCC认证在摩洛哥不被认可——出口商须采用IMANOR合规路径或提交CE符合性声明（因摩洛哥-欧盟高级地位而被接受）。CCC与IMANOR/CE之间不存在直接等效关系。
gap.zht: 摩洛哥NM IEC 60034-30-1採用與IEC 60034-30-1相同的IE等級結構，GB 18613-2020 IE3電機在命名上大體一致；但GB 18613的具體數值限制與IEC 60034-30-1:2014在特定功率/極數組合下可能存在差異。CCC認證在摩洛哥不被認可——出口商須採用IMANOR合規路徑或提交CE符合性聲明（因摩洛哥-歐盟高級地位而被接受）。CCC與IMANOR/CE之間不存在直接等效關係。

mandatory_status.target: IMANOR conformity or CE DoC acceptance applies; CCC not recognised; mandatory minimum efficiency not yet set by Moroccan statute equivalent to EU Ecodesign — verify current IMANOR/ANRE requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 is a compulsory national standard enforced by SAMR from 2021-06-01

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A motor bearing only Chinese CCC or GB 18613-2020 certification is not automatically compliant for Morocco market entry. IMANOR conformity or a CE DoC (leveraging Morocco-EU Advanced Status) is the expected route. Exporters should confirm the current applicable conformity pathway with IMANOR or a qualified Moroccan trade professional before shipment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国CCC或GB 18613-2020认证的电动机不能自动视为符合摩洛哥市场准入要求。IMANOR合规路径或CE符合性声明（借助摩洛哥-欧盟高级地位）是预期路径。出口商在出货前应向IMANOR或摩洛哥合格专业人士确认当前适用的合规路径。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國CCC或GB 18613-2020認證的電動機不能自動視為符合摩洛哥市場準入要求。IMANOR合規路徑或CE符合性聲明（借助摩洛哥-歐盟高級地位）是預期路徑。出口商在出貨前應向IMANOR或摩洛哥合格專業人士確認當前適用的合規路徑。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

summary.en: IMANOR adopts IEC test method standards as NM standards. NM IEC 60034-2-1 (mirroring IEC 60034-2-1:2014) provides the preferred test methodology for loss determination and efficiency measurement of rotating electrical machines in Morocco. When CE DoC acceptance is used as the conformity route, test evidence prepared to IEC 60034-2-1 or EN 60034-2-1 is appropriate. Morocco does not have a separate national test method diverging from the IEC baseline.
summary.zh: IMANOR将IEC测试方法标准采纳为NM标准。NM IEC 60034-2-1（对应IEC 60034-2-1:2014）为摩洛哥旋转电机的损耗测定和效率测量提供首选测试方法。当采用CE符合性声明接受路径时，依据IEC 60034-2-1或EN 60034-2-1准备的测试证据是适当的。摩洛哥没有偏离IEC基准的独立国家测试方法。
summary.zht: IMANOR將IEC測試方法標準採納為NM標準。NM IEC 60034-2-1（對應IEC 60034-2-1:2014）為摩洛哥旋轉電機的損耗測定和效率量測提供首選測試方法。當採用CE符合性聲明接受路徑時，依據IEC 60034-2-1或EN 60034-2-1準備的測試證據是適當的。摩洛哥沒有偏離IEC基準的獨立國家測試方法。

standards_or_laws: NM IEC 60034-2-1 (IMANOR adoption of IEC 60034-2-1:2014 — loss and efficiency determination)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 1032-2012 (Test Methods for Three-Phase Induction Motors) as the primary test standard, substantially harmonised with IEC 60034-2-1 but differing in stray-load-loss treatment in some methods. GB 18613-2020 references GB/T 1032 for efficiency determination. Test reports issued solely under GB/T 1032 may not be directly accepted for IMANOR conformity assessment or CE documentation without verification of equivalence.
summary.zh: 中国以GB/T 1032-2012《三相异步电动机试验方法》作为主要测试标准，与IEC 60034-2-1高度协调但部分方法在杂散负载损耗处理上存在差异。GB 18613-2020引用GB/T 1032进行效率测定。仅依据GB/T 1032出具的测试报告，若未核实等效性，可能不被直接接受用于IMANOR合规评估或CE文件。
summary.zht: 中國以GB/T 1032-2012《三相異步電動機試驗方法》作為主要測試標準，與IEC 60034-2-1高度協調但部分方法在雜散負載損耗處理上存在差異。GB 18613-2020引用GB/T 1032進行效率測定。僅依據GB/T 1032出具的測試報告，若未核實等效性，可能不被直接接受用於IMANOR合規評估或CE文件。

gap.en: Morocco follows IEC 60034-2-1 via NM adoption; GB/T 1032 reports may need equivalence justification for IMANOR or CE acceptance routes. The stray-load-loss treatment difference means GB/T 1032 results could report higher efficiency than IEC 60034-2-1 for the same motor. Retesting to NM IEC 60034-2-1 or IEC 60034-2-1 at an accredited laboratory is advisable for market access documentation.
gap.zh: 摩洛哥通过NM标准采纳IEC 60034-2-1；GB/T 1032报告可能需要等效性论证方可用于IMANOR或CE接受路径。杂散负载损耗处理方式的差异意味着GB/T 1032结果对同一电机可能报告比IEC 60034-2-1更高的效率。建议在认可实验室按NM IEC 60034-2-1或IEC 60034-2-1重新测试以支持市场准入文件。
gap.zht: 摩洛哥通過NM標準採納IEC 60034-2-1；GB/T 1032報告可能需要等效性論證方可用於IMANOR或CE接受路徑。雜散負載損耗處理方式的差異意味著GB/T 1032結果對同一電機可能報告比IEC 60034-2-1更高的效率。建議在認可實驗室按NM IEC 60034-2-1或IEC 60034-2-1重新測試以支持市場准入文件。

mandatory_status.target: Preferred test basis for IMANOR conformity and CE DoC routes; NM IEC 60034-2-1 applies as Morocco's adopted IEC test method
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory reference — GB/T 1032-2012 referenced by compulsory GB 18613-2020; harmonised but not identical to IEC 60034-2-1

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A motor test report based solely on GB/T 1032-2012 may not satisfy IMANOR conformity assessment or CE documentation expectations for Morocco without equivalence justification. Testing to NM IEC 60034-2-1 or IEC 60034-2-1 at an accredited laboratory is a common route to support market access. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅基于GB/T 1032-2012的电机测试报告，若未说明等效性，可能无法满足摩洛哥IMANOR合规评估或CE文件要求。在认可实验室按NM IEC 60034-2-1或IEC 60034-2-1进行测试是支持市场准入的常用路径。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅基於GB/T 1032-2012的電機測試報告，若未說明等效性，可能無法滿足摩洛哥IMANOR合規評估或CE文件要求。在認可實驗室按NM IEC 60034-2-1或IEC 60034-2-1進行測試是支持市場准入的常用路徑。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
